summary: Iteration 127 - Voice Retirement Analysis & i18n Testing. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tested features working correctly. New voice-retirement API returns structured JSON with CGT/franking credits analysis. RetirementVoicePanel component renders correctly with all data-testids. i18n translations working on AdviceOS, Retirement Confidence, Strategic Planning, and Share Portfolio pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice Retirement API working correctly - POST /api/voice-retirement/analyze returns structured JSON with client_summary, retirement_analysis, tax_considerations, age_pension, recommendations
RetirementVoicePanel component has all required data-testids: retirement-voice-panel, retirement-voice-mic, retirement-voice-input, retirement-voice-send, retirement-analysis-results
i18n translations rendering correctly - no raw translation keys visible on tested pages
Language selector visible at bottom-left of sidebar showing 'English'
Floating voice assistant button visible at bottom-right corner
Navigation between major pages (Dashboard, Retirement, AdviceOS, Share Portfolio) working correctly
test_credentials: No auth needed - all endpoints are open
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 127 verified: (1) New voice-retirement backend route at /api/voice-retirement/analyze working with GPT-5.2 for retirement analysis with CGT/franking credits, (2) RetirementVoicePanel component on /retirement page with all data-testids, (3) i18n translations working on AdviceOS, RetirementConfidence, StrategicPlanning, SharePortfolio pages, (4) Language selector at bottom-left of sidebar, (5) Floating voice assistant button at bottom-right. Route for Retirement Planner is /retirement (not /retirement-planner).

voice_retirement_api.notes: Returns structured JSON with client_summary, retirement_analysis, tax_considerations (CGT, franking credits), age_pension, recommendations. Tested with basic, complex, and CGT/franking scenarios.

voice_retirement_transcribe.notes: Endpoint exists and accepts audio uploads (returns 422 without audio file as expected)

buffett_engine.notes: Returns stock ideas with BUY/AVOID recommendations

retirement_voice_panel.notes: Component renders correctly, input field works, send button triggers analysis, results display with structured data

adviceos_i18n.notes: Page loads with translated labels, 5 tabs visible (Overview, Scenarios, Compliance, Audit Trail, Reports)

strategic_planning_i18n.notes: Page title 'Strategic Financial Planning' displayed correctly

navigation.notes: Navigation between Dashboard, Retirement Planner, AdviceOS, Share Portfolio working correctly
